settings.title: PalGate Settings
settings.subtitle: Link your PalGate account and configure gate behavior.
settings.qrHint: Open the PalGate App, and navigate to Device Linking > Link a Device and then scan the QR code. The linking will complete and configuration will be updated automatically.

status.startLinkFirst: Start linking first to generate QR.
status.waiting: Waiting for confirmation from PalGate app...
status.stillWaiting: Still waiting. Please complete QR scan in PalGate app.
status.linkSuccess: Link successful. Details were updated automatically. Click Save to persist.
status.qrReady: QR ready. Scan from PalGate app, detection is automatic...
